_readme: KELEDON autonomous task queue — optimized for Claude Sonnet 4.6. Read fully before touching any file.

session_state.last_completed: B-004 CODE COMPLETE — OpenAI TTS fallback committed to main (7c33391). nginx.conf fixed: /tts route was not proxied to backend (405 on POST /tts/speak), now added /tts|/ws to backend proxy regex.
session_state.next_action: B-005: LLM structured command output — replace keyword-reparse with OpenAI function calling in DecisionEngine

active_plan.name: WebRTC + RPA Voice Integration
active_plan.goal: Wire WebRTC media layer, Cloud decision loop, RPA automation, Agent participation for real-time voice-driven browser control.

tasks.title: Fix CDP Connection - use Electron APIs directly for BrowserView control
Enhance Goal Mapper with Better Pattern Matching
Fix Logs - lazy initialization of log paths
Fix Installer Size - pre-build cleanup script
Release Ops: branch hygiene + CI skeleton
tasks.what: 5 phases: branch pruning (17 local deleted), release.yml (fixed build + signing gate + cloud deploy + landing update), signing policy (Azure Trusted Signing), E2E runbook (5 scenarios), docs spine.
tasks.acceptance: PR merged to main, branch-governance.md committed, release.yml triggers on vX.Y.Z tags

backlog.title: WebRTC + RPA Voice Integration
backlog.notes: ElevenLabs audio wired into brain:command flow. WebRTC injector (spec-compliant getUserMedia override). Consent UI. ui_steps handler. v0.2.0.

backlog.title: Release v0.2.0 + Next Planning
backlog.notes: v0.2.0 tagged, CI passed, GitHub Release live (KELEDON.Browser.Setup.0.2.0.exe + keledon-v0.2.0-win-x64.zip). 69 stale branches pruned. release.yml: contents:write perm + deploy-cloud via hook.

backlog.title: ElevenLabs Integration Smoke Test + Next Feature
backlog.notes: Code complete: OpenAI TTS fallback (tts-1, nova voice) deployed to main. Railway uses OpenAI since ELEVENLABS_API_KEY not set. Smoke test (WebSocket voice chain) requires live Electron app — manual step for user. nginx fix: /tts POST was 405 because route not in nginx proxy regex; fixed.

backlog.title: LLM Structured Command Output
backlog.notes: Replace keyword-reparse pattern in DecisionEngine with OpenAI function calling. LLM now returns structured {type, text?, steps?, mode?} via tool_calls. Eliminates mapLLMResponseToCommand() text-scan anti-pattern. Steps use action enum: navigate|click|type|fill|wait|extract|select|hover|scroll|screenshot.

context.canonical_loop: Scan -> Claim -> Plan -> Execute -> Commit -> Push -> PR -> Report -> Scan
global_guardrails: Cloud decides, Browser executes. Never add decision logic to browser/.
Never modify docs/specs/ without a governance Issue.
Never declare completion without a PR.
NO Google Generative AI API - Ollama/OpenAI only
